title: رقم شيخ روحاني عماني 0096899044920
excerpt: I need to create a landing page through which the form data can be filled out by the client, and I have the right to reject and accept the data, and it should be linked to the crm control panel.

posts.author: edpillst (edpillst)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to create a landing page through which the form data can be filled out by the client, and I have the right to reject and accept the data, and it should be linked to the crm control panel.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @edpillst,

You can use the Workforms embed feature to embed the form into your landing page. Form results will then be reflected in the associated board for you to analyse

  • https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000358700-All-about-monday-WorkForms#share_your_workform

You can then connect that board/link the information to your CRM board, if this is your end goal
